title: premna scoriarum
intro: Premna scoriarum, also known as Premna tomentosa, is an aromatic shrub native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Premna scoriarum include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Premna scoriarum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water.
